title: Target realization
summary: Scan a residual-owned finite candidate schedule for a proof-carrying target witness; otherwise return exact target avoidance.
work: Linear in the candidate schedule, within the registered polynomial bound.

title: Local deletion and criticality
summary: Delete one residual-selected local piece and decide strict progress or complementary criticality.
work: Bounded by the finite local-piece schedule.

title: Response compression
summary: Compare exact finite response rows, transport a known representative, or expose a novel response.
work: Finite table comparison under the registered polynomial bound.

title: Deterministic charging
summary: Assign each demand to its first eligible payer and compare every fibre with its capacity.

title: Local-witness aggregation
summary: Aggregate finite local witness contributions against a resource budget.
work: Bounded by the total witness-fibre scan.

title: Ordered activity analysis
summary: Find the first failed site in an ordered schedule or certify the complete active ledger.

title: Exact context classification
summary: Realize the target in a finite context, find the first distinguishing context, or certify response neutrality.

title: Type repetition and response
summary: Detect the first repeated finite type and decide response separation or certified strict removal.
work: Quadratic pair scan unless a sharper capability is registered.

title: Label-fibre overload
summary: Partition residual-owned items by exact finite labels and find the first fibre exceeding capacity.
work: Linear labeling plus finite fibre accounting.

title: Finite refinement classification
summary: Classify a complete residual-owned datum schedule, selecting the first direct or missing class.

title: Additive-deficit localization
summary: Localize a negative aggregate to the first inadmissible or locally negative cell.

title: Well-founded peeling
summary: Iterate proof-carrying strict decreases through a finite predecessor-owned peeling schedule.
work: Exact iteration count bounded by the schedule.

title: Tiered resource selection
summary: Choose the first eligible primary payer, otherwise compute the canonical lower-tier fallback.

title: Mass and capacity aggregation
summary: Aggregate lower mass, optional capacities, labels, and multiplicities across a finite support.
work: Linear in members plus label aggregation.

title: Target-relative rank
summary: Compute finite target-dependent coordinates and compare full-rank charge with capacity.
work: Bounded by the coordinate schedule and rank checks.

title: Closed-code exhaustion
summary: Compute one closed code over the whole finite support and compare it literally with the target code.

title: Bounded target thickening
summary: Scan offsets, scales, and positions for compatibility and compute finite-block survivors.
work: Product of the registered finite parameter schedules.
